name: @a5c-ai/triggers-mux
description: Event trigger normalization, enrichment, and filtering mux for automation actions
author: a5c-ai

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.verify:release: npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:coverage
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --root ../.. --config vitest.config.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/action-helpers.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/action-metadata.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/backend-modules.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/backends.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/cli.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/enrich.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/query.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/readme-examples.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/src
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && vitest run --root ../.. --config vitest.config.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/action.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/dist-cli.smoke.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run --root ../.. --config vitest.config.ts --coverage --coverage.include=packages/triggers-mux/src/**/*.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/action-helpers.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/action-metadata.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/action.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/backend-modules.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/backends.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/cli.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/enrich.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/query.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/tests/readme-examples.test.ts packages/triggers-mux/src
